title: operational_bulletin
description: Canonical pre-task operational bulletin. The same interface and schema are present on every run; only field content varies. All fields are required and must be populated on every run.

bulletin_id.description: Neutral identifier, e.g. 'b-001'. No condition or project labels.

effective_window.description: Human-readable window the bulletin applies to.

priority.description: Operational priority. Always present; populated on every run.

operational_context.description: Free-text operational context. Carries the substantive content the deployment may key posture off of.

recommended_posture.description: Recommended operational posture. Populated with routine guidance when nothing elevated applies.

reference.description: Neutral reference pointer, e.g. a runbook id.
